items.title: The Resurgence of Mindfulness in Modern Spiritual Practice
items.summary: This article explores the global resurgence of mindfulness as a spiritual practice, tracing its roots in ancient traditions and examining its adaptation in modern contexts such as mental health, corporate wellness, and education. It reflects on the balance between commercialization and authenticity in mindfulness teachings.

items.title: The Evolution of Sports Analytics: Beyond Numbers to Player Psychology
items.summary: This piece delves into the next frontier of sports analytics, where data on player mental resilience, stress response, and cognitive function are integrated with physical performance metrics to create holistic athlete profiles, influencing coaching and game-day decisions.

items.title: Geopolitical Shifts in the Indo-Pacific: Strategic Alliances and Emerging Challenges
items.summary: The article analyzes recent geopolitical developments in the Indo-Pacific, focusing on how emerging alliances and rivalries are reshaping regional stability, trade routes, and global diplomatic strategies, with implications for major powers and smaller states alike.

items.title: The Role of Public Media in Countering Disinformation in the Digital Age
items.summary: This article assesses strategies employed by public media organizations to combat disinformation, including fact-checking collaborations, audience engagement, and transparency initiatives, highlighting successes and ongoing challenges in maintaining democratic discourse.

items.title: Reimagining Urban Public Transport: Sustainable Models for Growing Cities
items.summary: Focusing on case studies from diverse global cities, this article evaluates how integrated planning, technology adoption, and community participation are transforming public transport infrastructure to reduce congestion, pollution, and inequality.
